message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor White
  ArrowColor Black
  BorderColor Black
  FontColor Black
}

class "«FilingSystem»\nFilingSystem" as FilingSystem {
  data_storage: bool
  storage_limited: bool
}

class "«TechnicalMeasure»\nTechnicalMeasure" as TechnicalMeasure {
  stereotype: GENERIC_STEREOTYPE
  category: TECHNOLOGY_CATEGORY
}

class "«Controller»\nController" as Controller {
  processor: bool
}

class "«ProcessingSystem»\nProcessingSystem" as ProcessingSystem {
  confidentiality: bool
  integrity: bool
  availability: bool
  resilient: bool
  pseudonymity: bool
  data_minimization: bool
  redundancies: bool
  tested: bool
}

class "«ProcessingTask»\nProcessingTask" as ProcessingTask {
  logged: bool
}

class "«Artifact»\nProcessingLog" as ProcessingLog {
  name: bool
  contact_details: bool
  personal_data_category: bool
  data_storage_period: bool
  technical_measures: bool
  recipients: Array
}

class "«Processor»\nProcessor" as Processor
class "«Recipient»\nRecipient" as Recipient
class "«ThirdParty»\nThirdParty" as ThirdParty
class "«DataHandler»\nDataHandler" as DataHandler
class "«DataSubject»\nDataSubject" as DataSubject {
  minor: false
}

class "«PersonalData»\nPersonalData" as PersonalData {
  category: DATA_CATEGORY
}

class "«Purpose»\nPurpose" as Purpose {
  consent: CLASS consent
  contract_performance: bool
  controller_legal_obligation: bool
  vital_interest_protection: bool
  public_interest: bool
  legitimate_interest: bool
}

class "«SpecialPurpose»\nSpecialPurpose" as SpecialPurpose {
  consent: CLASS consent
  employment_purpose: bool
  social_purpose: bool
  vital_interest: bool
  nonprofit_body: bool
  public_from_subject: bool
  legal_claim: bool
  public_interest: bool
  preventive_medicine: bool
  occupational_medicine: bool
  public_health: bool
  archiving: bool
  statistical_purposes: bool
}

class "«Consent»\nConsent" as Consent
class "«Artifact»\nConsentAgreement" as ConsentAgreement {
  clear_purpose: bool
  unambiguous: bool
  affirmative_action: bool
  distinguishable: bool
  specific: bool
  withdrawable: bool
  freely_given: bool
}

FilingSystem --> ProcessingSystem : secures
TechnicalMeasure --> ProcessingSystem : implements
Controller --> ProcessingSystem : implements
ProcessingSystem --> ProcessingTask : performs
ProcessingTask --> ProcessingLog : manifests
Controller --> DataHandler
Processor --> DataHandler
Recipient --> DataHandler
ThirdParty --> DataHandler
DataHandler --> PersonalData : receives
DataSubject --> PersonalData : provides
PersonalData --> SpecialPurpose : requires
PersonalData --> Consent : requires
Purpose --> Consent
Consent --> ConsentAgreement : manifests

note right of ProcessingLog
  name: bool
  contact_details: bool
  personal_data_category: bool
  data_storage_period: bool
  technical_measures: bool
  recipients: Array
end note

note right of ConsentAgreement
  clear_purpose: bool
  unambiguous: bool
  affirmative_action: bool
  distinguishable: bool
  specific: bool
  withdrawable: bool
  freely_given: bool
end note

@enduml
